feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Beacon & Badge
entry.summary:
Author: akashingen

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,193Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Twenty years ago, Stiles Stilinski accidentally set a pencil on fire during math class and got dragged to the Hale House for Spark training. Unfortunately, the Hale family kept him. Now thirty years old, Stiles is one of the most terrifying emissaries in supernatural California. Derek Hale is Alpha of the Hale Pack and CEO of Hale Enterprises. Apparently, they’ve been emotionally married since approximately 2008. Honestly, Stiles would like it noted that none of this was his fault. Not the years of movie nights, the orange slices, the forehead kisses, the domesticity, or the fact that Derek apparently courted him using romance scenes from Jonathan Hale’s bestselling detective novels. In Stiles’s defense, Derek Hale was obviously straight, out of his league, and definitely not looking at him like a Victorian widow seeing sunlight again. Unfortunately for Stiles, literally everyone else noticed years ago.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Not a soul
entry.summary:
Author: dd0g90

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,807Chapters: 11/19Kudos: 99

Summary: Stiles finds out his husband Derek has been having an affair with his father. He goes five years without running into his old pack. That is until Theo Raekin follows a familiar sent at a work site he's doing construction on.

entry.title: Rust, Dust, and Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Dino_Laurus_Rex

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,009Chapters: 13/75Kudos: 19

Summary: Seven years of unspoken words, hidden truths, and a bond forged in the shadows of Beacon Hills. ​Now, hidden away in a secluded bunker, Stiles Stilinski is completely on his own, carrying a secret pregnancy that connects him forever to the Hale lineage. As he looks back on the chaotic history that brought him here, he prepares for the hardest choice of his life—and the ultimate sacrifice made out of love. _______ Or just my version of the sterek ship.

entry.title: perdí mi ojo de venado
entry.summary:
Author: dutch (itsevanffs)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,040Chapters: 4/13Kudos: 60

Summary: One thing Derek Hale has never been, will never be, is redeemable. No, he's too broken, too fucked up for that. There's too much blood on his hands: an amount that several lifetimes of baptismal water won't wash off.One thing he is, however, is lonely. And a man who convinces himself he can't get better can only get worse.

entry.title: Best Drink of my Life
entry.summary:
Author: isthatbloodonhisshirt (wasterella)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,949Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 150

Summary: The only reason he and Derek Hale had started dating after dancing around the topic for like, four years was because Derek had finally bit the bullet and asked him.He was pretty sure Derek had expected Stiles to reject him. He’d looked so tense, and so stoic while asking him that during the leadup, Stiles had been waiting for him to say someone had died. When he finally got the words out, it took a solid twenty seconds for Stiles’ brain to switch gears and realize this was good news, and Derek was just building up his defences for a negative response.Too bad for him, because Stiles had jumped him. Not sexually, but he had legitimately jumped him, wrapping both arms and legs around the older man like an octopus and demanding to know why Derek had taken so fucking long to ask.Derek had returned—after the shock wore off—that Stiles could’ve just asked him if he felt the same way, and that was when Stiles realized people were their own worst enemies sometimes. They’d both loved one another for so long, but until Derek had been brave enough to say something, neither of them had done anything about it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Baby It's Cold Outside
entry.summary:
Author: isthatbloodonhisshirt (wasterella)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,146Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 206

Summary: [Stiles]I can’t sleep :( He knew staring wasn’t going to make Derek respond any faster—if he was even awake this time—but he kept the message open anyway, waiting. After a solid minute, he was pretty sure Derek was asleep, and was about to put his phone back down when he finally saw the three dots appear, denoting that he was typing. Waiting, he knew Derek had to be typing and deleting things, because he spent much too long typing for the two words he sent in response over thirty seconds later. [Derek]Who cares? “Wha—?” Stiles sputtered aloud, and then began to respond immediately. [Stiles]:([Stiles]don’t you care about me now?

entry.title: Hell Hills
entry.summary:
Author: Loli12Blue

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,362Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 14

Summary: Stiles knew something was wrong. The fog began to cover Beacon Hills, the animals were acting strange, and something seemed to be watching from the shadows. No one wanted to listen to him. Until the crows flew through Derek’s loft, and he seemed to have forgotten something—or someone. -------------------------------------------------------------- This is my first fanfic. I do not own the characters or Teen Wolf.

entry.summary:
Author: Kass_Writes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 64,195Chapters: 25/25Kudos: 1,211

Summary: In which Stiles is kicked out of Scott’s pack and the Sheriff is tired of Scott McCall hurting his son. He calls in reinforcements and those reinforcements come to clean up the mess of Beacon Hills while also kicking some serious True Alpha ass. Scott McCall will learn one thing by the time it’s all over………………….. No one is allowed to hurt Stiles EVER.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 53,402Chapters: 26/45Kudos: 54

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up as Stiles Stilinski's lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This story is a love letter to Sterek Fan Fiction. It imagines that every world from every Sterek fic is real and asks what would it be like if Stiles and Derek could travel to at least some of those worlds. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief stop in an A/B/O AU where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much. This story was originally my 2025 NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

entry.title: Rip My Ribcage Open (And Devour What Is Truly Yours)
entry.summary:
Author: Welsh_Woman

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,701Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 414

Summary: After so many years of fighting all the strange shit that Beacon Hills throws at them, the McCall Pack are a little leery when they are visited by a Pack that claims they're there to help them become more of a team, more of a family...When the Hale Pack arrive and speak of a long standing claim to the Beacon Hills territory, Scott is instantly suspicious and combative, but Stiles wants to know who these newcomers are and what they can share.And why he feels so drawn to their Alpha, to a man that seems to be just as entranced by Stiles, despite the fact that he holds a secret that might topple the fraught bonds the McCall Pack share.

entry.title: All Hale Caffeine - Book 2
entry.summary:
Author: Molly_Is_A_Fangirl

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,702Chapters: 6/18Kudos: 77

Summary: Kate Argent is dead. Victoria Argent is locked up for life. But Gerard's out on the prowl, bloodthirsty for revenge and there is a Kanima running around town killing people, seemingly at random. With the help of the magic councils, can Chris and Allison trick Gerard into defeat? More importantly, will Chris be able to move past what he's done?While the pack races to figure out who the Kanima is and Stiles attempts to control his ever-growing magic, Gerard Argent looms closer and closer, threatening to unravel the pack and the happiness they have found. Coffee Shop AU Rewrite of Season 2. Please read Book 1 first, to understand what is going on.

entry.title: Am I Not Attractive To Gay Guys?
entry.summary:
Author: AnachronisticFruit

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,458Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 20

Summary: Ever since Danny came out in seventh grade, Stiles was constantly asking him if he found Stiles attractive. Well, no, not exactly, he would ask "am I attractive to gay gays?" or "do gay guys find me attractive?". Danny always just ignored him. He wasn't just there to be some straight guy's ego boost. Even though he was kinda cute. He was very much a twink, and Danny knew plenty of gay guys who would definitely be attracted to Stiles. And, yeah, sure, gay guys aren't a monolith, yada yada, but an hour down at The Jungle and Stiles would find just how attractive gay guys found him.

entry.title: He can't be dead
entry.summary:
Author: dromlex

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,192Chapters: 2/20Kudos: 24

Summary: After Derek Hale's death, Eli calls Stiles Stilinski. He doesn't remember his face, but he knows his name from the countless stories he's heard throughout his life. Stiles returns to Beacon Hills with a secret. A secret that, when the grief becomes too much, will bring Derek Hale back to life.

entry.title: O U T S I D E
entry.summary:
Author: eternautumn

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,618Chapters: 15/16Kudos: 40

Summary: Derek is an agent working for the FBI and on the trail of an elusive serial killer, though always two steps behind. Stiles is an eccentric starving artist and part-time sleuth that may just be the key to a break in the case. Somewhere outside, they meet in the middle.   A dark AU.

entry.title: Aloha Bitch
entry.summary:
Author: isthatbloodonhisshirt (wasterella)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,141Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 198

Summary: “Derek,” Stiles whined, stretching the vowels out much more than was necessary. “What?” “I’m so hot.” “And?” Stiles reached out one hand to smack blindly towards Derek’s face. He missed entirely for about five smacks before giving up and smacking him in the side instead. Derek didn’t react, because it hadn’t been intended to hurt him, just show him Stiles was displeased with his lack of sympathy. He knew it was all a very unsubtle way to convince Derek to buy a portable A/C unit, but he refused. Not because he wanted Stiles to suffer, but because if Stiles was comfortable, he wouldn’t wander around the loft in his underwear. Derek was not going to give up having a mostly naked boyfriend parading around the place. Did that make him an asshole? Probably, but Stiles knew what he was signing up for when they started dating two years ago. Derek was living up to his assholeish reputation by refusing to buy an A/C unit so he could ogle his boyfriend as he wandered around the loft mostly naked.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
